No Shoes. Kick Back.
Just Relax.

Play Full Video

Get KB's Guide to Exuma, Bahamas

The real local's guide to our little piece of paradise.

Get my Guide

Our Story

Chat ‘N’ Chill® was born in 1998 as a day camp for people who lived on their boats in Elizabeth Harbour. Somewhere they could go for great food, volleyball, a chilled-out atmosphere and even Sunday church without needing a car or a taxi.

Not much has changed since then except our reputation – we are humbled by our visitors who have helped catapult us to 'world famous' status! Salt-encrusted travelers from all over the world chill with the locals here over beers and conch salad. Visitors shop for gifts at our Chat ‘N’ Chill® Beach Boutique. Couples from all over the world fall in love all over again renewing their vows.

We’re proud to say that Chat ‘N’ Chill® was – and still is - the quintessential laid-back, bare-feet beach bar for real beach bums. Come chill with us!

Read the Full Story

Weddings and Events

Because no one ever said "I wish this party was in a boring reception hall instead of the beach..."

Book An Event

Things to Do

Sunday
Pig Roast

Come enjoy music, island drinks and a real Bahamian whole pig roast every Sunday from noon to 7 p.m. (or whenever we run out).

Learn More

Get
Married

From small intimate affairs to large matrimonial bashes, our sister company – A Wedding Breeze – handles everything so you can relax and enjoy your day.

Book Now

Chill
With Us

Enjoy a truly Instagram-worthy day of feeding the stingrays and playing volleyball on the beach right in front of Chat N’ Chill®.

Learn More

Explore
the Island

Discover Jacques Cousteau’s Mystery Cave, walk among some of the world’s oldest fossils, traverse the Exuma Islands on hidden nature trails, and of course – swim with the famous pigs!

Learn More

Laid-Back Beach Eats

Crowd Favorites

Chat 'N' Chill® Sunday Pig Roast 22
BBQ Ribs 'N' Fries or Rice + Slaw 20
Island Grilled Fish 'N' Fries or Rice + Slaw 20
Butterflied Grilled Chicken Breast 'N' Fries or Rice + Slaw 19
Conchburger (KB's Signature Recipe Ground Fresh Daily) 7
Tropical Goombay Smash with a Floater 10

Sunday Pig Roast

The Roast is every Sunday from
12 Noon and Includes:

Bahamian Style Roasted Pulled Pork

KB's Mama's Native Peas 'N' Rice

Bahamian-style Macaroni 'N' Cheese

Cinnamon Glazed Carrots

KB's Garlic "Cabbage" Slaw

Cracklin'
(You Hog Lovers Know That's the Skin)

Sandwiches

Conchburger (KB'S Signature Recipe Ground Fresh Daily) 7
Grilled Chicken Breast 8
Cheeseburger 7
Hamburger 6
Hot Dog 5
Grilled Cheese 4

Sides

KB's Garlic "Cabbage" Slaw 4
KB's Mama's Native Peas 'N' Rice 4
Bahamian-Style Macaroni 'N' Cheese (Sundays Only For Now!) 5
French Fries 4

Salads

Salad 'N' Roll 7
...W/ Butterflied Grilled Chicken Breast 19
...W/ Island Grilled Filet of Fish 20
Freshly Made Conch Salad
(Available at the Conch Bar on the Beach)		 10
Freshly Made Tropical Conch Salad 15

Beers

Kalik 5
Kalik Light 5
Kalik Gold 6
Sands 5
Sands Light 5
Guinness 6
Bud Light 6

Tropical Drinks

Bahama Mama 10
Bahamamita (Cuervo Floater) 12
Goombay Smash 10
Pina Colada 10
Patron Margarita 14
Rum Punch 10
Blue Chill 12
Take Away Punch By Gallon 110

Frozen Drinks

Strawberry 10
Mango 10
Banana 10
Pina Colada 10
Mudslide 14

Shots

Patron 10
Jose Cuervo 7
Jagermeister 10
Cognac 9
Rum/Vodka 6

Wines

Red 10
White 10

Non-Alcoholic

Bahamian Fruit Punch 6
Strawberry Virgin Frozen 8
Mango Virgin Frozen 8
Banana Virgin Frozen 8
Lemonade 4
Bottled Water 3
Fruit Juices (Pineapple, Orange, Cranberry, Grapefruit) 4
Sodas (Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, Ginger Ale, Club, Tonic & Shirley Temple) 3

See Our Full Menu

In the News

Read More

"With its open-air bar, outdoor grill, volleyball beach and waterside conch-salad shack, the place feels destined to become a Jimmy Buffett song."

-Washington Times

A Unique, Chill Experience

We always have a great time at Chat N Chill, its just fun hanging out there and is a great spot for photographs. We rented a boat from Minns to get there but the water taxis are an easy and fairly inexpensive way to get there too.

@Z5731KAmike
April 2019

There are just some places that you visit and say "wow, what a cool place!" That was my experience. We had burgers for lunch which were fine, but the atmosphere was incredible. A classic Caribbean beach bar...

@Baxydog
April 2019

We stopped at the Chat 'N' Chill on our Stocking Island trip. I tried the conch for the first time and I really liked it. The bar was full as expected but the beach was nice and people were having a great time. Feeding the stingrays was cool and I enjoyed our stop.

@David P
March 2019
